description: Hand-labeled caption/comment/headline examples used to train the Naive Bayes pass in scrapers/classifier.py. Texts are phrased the way residents actually write — mostly WITHOUT the literal CATEGORY_KEYWORDS — so the model learns paraphrases the keyword pass misses. categories: [] marks a non-civic negative example.

examples.text: My tire blew out on Jamboree this morning, that crater near the exit has been there for weeks
Third time getting my alignment fixed thanks to Culver Drive
The road by Northwood is basically swiss cheese at this point
Hit a huge dip on Irvine Blvd and my rim is bent
When is the city going to fix the giant hole on Alton
Bumpiest ride of my life down Barranca, fix the streets
My suspension is destroyed from driving on Walnut every day
That gap in the pavement on Yale almost took out my bike
Cracks all over the street near the elementary school, someone is going to trip
City said they would resurface our street in March, still waiting
Rim bent, tire flat, thanks Irvine public works

Swerved to miss a hole in the road and almost hit the curb

Neighbors blasting music until 2am again, third weekend in a row

Two-car wreck at Sand Canyon and Irvine Center, avoid the area

Street racers doing donuts in the intersection at midnight
